title: hieracium pseudocerinthe subsp. scapiflorum
intro: Hieracium pseudocerinthe subsp. scapiflorum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudocerinthe subsp. scapiflorum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, improve circulation, and provide antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
